Type.description: The type of item. Possible values are: * Service - Indicates that this item is a pricing option. * Product - Indicates that this item is a retail product. * Package - Indicates that this item is a package. * Tip - Indicates that this item is a tip.

Metadata.description: Contains information about the item to be purchased. See [Cart Item Metadata](https://developers.mindbodyonline.com/PublicDocumentation /V6#cart-item-metadata) for more information.
